title: SolarForge
description: Adds a bunch of new armor and weapon items to make Minecraft progression just that more complicated and customizable
body:
# Hello and welcome to **SolarForge**!
in this mod you will be crafting a mulitude of items ranging form armor to spears, battleaxes and swords

## currently in the mod:
- Effects
    - Light Headed
    - Overheated
    - Paniced
    - Famished
- Blocks
    - Alloy Smithery
- Tungsten (AKA bootleg netherite)
    - tungsten tools
    - tungsten armor
    - tungsten Block (with redstone compatibility)
- Bark
    - Bark Armor
    - Far too many crafting recipes for turning a striped log back into its normal veriant
- Black smithing templates for swords, battle axes, and spears
- Copper
    - Copper Darts
    - Copper Armor
    - Copper-knuckles
    - lightning Wand
- Copper-Tungsten alloy
    - Copper-Tungsten Alloy armor
    - Skull Spliter

## plans for future updates: 
- The aquatic update 
    - new effects related to the ocean 
    - a new use for prismarine 
    - **possibly** new mobs (not guaranteed)
- the calling of the void update 
    - a new dimension
    - hollow ore
    - **possibly** unstable soul fragments (not guaranteed)
